calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-059/MECH-358 escape-affordance-bridge SAFETY-HALF readiness microdiagnostic (V3-EXQ-603i SECONDARY gap): 2-arm OFF/ON probe over a REAL agent under controlled retained threat with a seeded MECH-304 positive control. Validates that the bridge safety half now credits non-vacuously when fed a trained MECH-303/304 threat-absence signal (603i: safety half credited 0/3 because the raw threat_scale<=0 check almost never fires under Stage-H). claim-free diagnostic; NOT the full 4-arm G_H behavioural retest (which stays gated on the PRIMARY nav-competence ceiling).
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC, claim_ids=[]. Validates ONLY the SECONDARY 603i gap (safety-half trained-signal wiring landed this session: escape_use_trained_safety_signal feeds max(MECH-304 ConditionedSafetyStore.predict, MECH-303 ResidueField.evaluate_safety) into bridge.update; the safety credit fires on raw threat-absence OR trained signal >= threshold, inside the under-threat+directed gate). G0 ARM_OFF safety credit==0 (3/3, reproduces 603i starvation); G1 (load-bearing) ARM_ON mech358_n_safety_credit_trained>0 (>=2/3); G2 ARM_ON safety_affordance_max>0 (>=2/3); G3 relief unaffected both arms (>=2/3). PASS=G0 AND G1 AND G2 AND G3 -> label safety_half_trained_signal_ready. Readiness precondition matched to G1's routing gate (mean fed trained safety_signal clears safety_signal_threshold on the seeded positive control AND under-threat gate open); below-floor self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (probe-driver/predictor-population regression), NOT a bridge verdict. Does NOT validate/weaken SD-059/MECH-358 (stay candidate/v3_pending/pending_retest_after_substrate); does NOT touch V3-EXQ-603i. PASS routes to the full 603-lineage behavioural bridge retest, which is ALSO gated on the PRIMARY nav-competence ceiling (scaffolded_sd054_onboarding Stage-H leg / separate chip) -- do NOT queue the behavioural retest here. Dry-run PASS 2026-06-09 (1 seed, all gates). validate_experiments --strict OK. seeds=3 x conditions=2 -> 6 verdict lines; episodes_per_run=40 ([train] ep N/40 denominator). Concurrency: appended alongside an active 653 queue-session; working-tree-vs-HEAD audit clean at append.

items.title: SD-057/MECH-346/MECH-347 cue-authority lineage CLEAN EVIDENCE retest: re-run the 640a scaffold cue-recall gain sweep (cue_recall_gain{0.2,1.0,5.0} x kappa{2.0,10.0} + ARM_OFF, 3 seeds) now that modulatory-bias-selection-authority is VALIDATED (V3-EXQ-643a PASS). use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 on every arm so the cue->z_goal->MECH-295 approach bias has bounded authority over the E3.select argmin in the contact-making scaffold P2 env. Promotes 640a (diagnostic, flat lift, authority OFF) to EVIDENCE.
items.note: EVIDENCE (claim_ids=[SD-057,MECH-346,MECH-347], all v3_pending; serial L6 cue-recall -> L4 token-pointer seed -> SD-057 bank chain co-tagged because the post-cue approach lift cannot be attributed to one link). Acceptance: PRIMARY C_LIFT_PRIMARY = post_cue_approach_lift>0 over within-run background on >=2/3 seeds in the pre-registered decisive cell ARM_CUE_g5_k10 (maximal cue_pull); GUARDS C1 cue fires + C2 trace captured (no-trace -> non_contributory instrumentation FAIL, route /diagnose-errors, NOT evidence-against). overall=C1 AND C2 AND C_LIFT_PRIMARY. evidence_direction: supports / weakens / non_contributory per the gate. Secondary (reported, not verdict-driving, multiple-comparison caveat): C_LIFT_ANY across 6 cells + gain-monotonicity. The single change vs 640a is use_modulatory_selection_authority=True+gain=0.5 (validated V3-EXQ-643a PASS 2026-06-06 after the float32 catastrophic-cancellation fix); NO SD-056 online training in this harness so scores stay bounded and no rollout-norm clamp is needed. Smoke --dry-run PASS end-to-end 2026-06-07 (7 arms, cue fires 30-60/run, z_goal forms ~0.42-0.46, acceptance machinery exercised). seeds=3 x conditions=7 -> 21 verdict lines; episodes_per_run=235 (stage0 20+stage0b 10+P0 120+P1 70+P2 15).
